title: Front Office Manager - Beyond Wildlife India - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Beyond Wildlife India - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
We at Beyond Wildlife India are looking for an experienced Front Office Manager based out of Bhopal. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Beyond Wildlife India:
Beyond Wildlife India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Front Office

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Beyond Wildlife India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
